offer: For construction contractors processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual entry of handwritten work orders causes late payments. We convert handwritten work orders into digital invoices instead of manual transcription.
problem: manual entry of handwritten work orders leads to errors and delays in invoicing
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for construction contractors
Indie Hackers posts on similar workflows
DM outreach to construction contractors with demo video
Community forums for sharing tools among contractors
try_it: Let users try manual entry and simple invoice generation on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant communities
